info.name: Inventory Management Backend - Complete Modulewise API
info.description: Single complete Postman collection for the Inventory Management Backend, organized module-wise with nested folders for CRUD, workflows, imports, reporting, and supporting resources.

request.description: API root showing available high-level endpoints.
Authenticate and save JWT access/refresh tokens into Postman variables.
Verify whether an access token is valid.
Return information about the authenticated user.
Admin-only user creation. If password is omitted the API generates one.
Return the DRF browsable API session-login HTML form.
DRF session-auth login used by the browsable API.
DRF browsable API session-login route also exposes PUT; included for route completeness.
DRF session-auth logout used by the browsable API.

request.description: Soft delete a product by default.

item.name: Import Products From Excel or Backup CSV

request.description: Upload Product Master Excel file or Actual_Product_Data backup CSV. Use form-data key `file`. Full CSV imports start in the background and return 202 to avoid timeout. For CSV backup imports, optional form-data keys: `dry_run`, `batch_id`, `limit`, `chunk_size`, `skip_products`, `sync`.

formdata.description: Optional for CSV uploads. Use true to validate without writing.
Optional CSV row limit for testing.
Optional for CSV uploads. Use true to save extended rows only.
Optional for CSV uploads. Use true only for small files/tests; full imports should run in background.

request.description: Check progress summary for a CSV backup import batch.
Soft delete a categorie by default.
Soft delete a brand by default.
Soft delete a location by default.
Soft delete a color by default.
Upload color Excel file. Use form-data key `file`.
Download colors as an Excel file.
Soft delete a stock by default.
Manual adjustment. Positive quantity increases stock; negative decreases stock.
Increase stock by a positive quantity.
Decrease stock by a positive quantity, for example after packing an order.
Update primary and/or secondary locations for a stock item.
Upload current stock Excel file. Use form-data key `file`.
List stock items at or below minimum stock level.
Soft delete a stock movement audit record.
Permanently delete a stock movement audit record using force_delete=true.
Restore a soft-deleted stock movement if available.
Create incoming stock batch, add all roll meterage to StockItem.available_stock_in_mtr, and create an IN stock movement log.
List incoming stock batches with optional filters.
Get incoming stock batch header, rolls, and related IN movement log.
Return one Dymo label payload per roll: SKU, product name, meterage, batch ID, supplier, and date.
Mark labels generated for one or more stock batches. Pass batch_ids in the JSON body.

query.description: NEW, LABEL_PRINTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, SHIPPED, CANCELLED

request.description: Soft delete a order by default.

query.description: NEW, LABEL_PRINTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, SHIPPED, CANCELLED

request.description: List orders with nested order items. Supports same filters as List Orders.
List orders assigned to the current user.
Returns order statuses: NEW, LABEL_PRINTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, SHIPPED, CANCELLED.
Preferred endpoint for marking the order status as LABEL_PRINTED after printing the label.

item.name: Mark Label Printed - Legacy Confirm API

request.description: Backward-compatible endpoint. Marks the order status as LABEL_PRINTED.
Move order to IN_PROGRESS only when completion is more than 0% and less than 100%. Normally this is handled automatically by updating order item status.
Mark order as SHIPPED once shipping is booked via API. Order must be COMPLETED first.

Checks whether Royal Mail Click & Drop booking is configured without exposing secrets. Recommended setup is ROYAL_MAIL_API_KEY from Royal Mail Click & Drop Settings > Integrations > Click & Drop API. OAuth is optional only if Royal Mail provides valid OAuth authorization/token URLs.

query.description: Optional value returned by Royal Mail to the callback.

request.description: Optional OAuth helper only. Do not use for current Click & Drop setup unless Royal Mail confirms valid OAuth authorization/token URLs. For normal Click & Drop booking, use ROYAL_MAIL_API_KEY instead.
Shows optional Royal Mail OAuth connection status. Current recommended Click & Drop setup uses ROYAL_MAIL_API_KEY, so OAuth may remain disconnected.

query.description: Royal Mail provides this code after authorization.

request.description: Optional OAuth callback endpoint. Only used if Royal Mail confirms and supports OAuth for this app. Current Click & Drop booking should use ROYAL_MAIL_API_KEY.
Deactivates saved optional Royal Mail OAuth tokens without deleting old records. Not required for API-key based Click & Drop booking.

Creates this completed order in Royal Mail Click & Drop and marks the local order as SHIPPED after a successful API response. Recommended setup: set ROYAL_MAIL_API_KEY from Royal Mail Click & Drop Settings > Integrations > Click & Drop API. OAuth fallback is available only if Royal Mail provides valid OAuth endpoints.
Deprecated compatibility endpoint. Delivery status is no longer part of the order workflow; use Ship Order once shipping is booked.
Assign a user to handle the order.
Remove assigned employee from the order.
Add one item to an existing order.
Remove an item from an order.
Assign or unassign an employee to an order item. Send null to unassign.
Update picking/packing status and processed quantity.

item.name: Bulk Update Order Items Lable Printed

request.description: Update lable_printed for multiple order items by order item ids. Pass order_item_ids in the JSON body.
Upload orders from XML. Use form-data key `file`.
Fetch orders from configured Tiaknight SOAP service and import them.
Get order statistics and revenue totals.
Get one order status history record.
Combined dashboard counts for order statuses and stock health buckets.
